case_title: ANTHONY E HELD, PH.D, P.E VS. FIMCO INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-21-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT, PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA HEALTH & SAFETY CODE 25249.7 (F)(4) AND CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 664.6, JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE TERMS OF THE CONSENT JUDGMENT ATTACHED HERETO AS EXHIBIT A. BY STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES, THE COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION TO ENFORCE THE SETTLEMENT UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 664.6.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD, PH.D, P.E's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Held's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health & Safety Code. The Court will sign the proposed order and judgment.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
